name: Dungeon Story
short_description: This is a card-based adventure game where you command three adventurers to explore dungeons, acquire skills and abilities, defeat monsters, collect rewards, and strengthen your party. Lead your trio to conquer the final boss!
detailed_description:
This is a card-based adventure game where you command three adventurers to explore dungeons, acquire skills and abilities, defeat monsters, collect rewards, and strengthen your party. Lead your trio to conquer the final boss!

Game Features

During your journey, you’ll experience:

  • Three Playable Heroes: Lead three unique heroes, each with their own passive skills, to challenge the dungeon.

  • Dynamic Skill & Ability Building: Earn gold by defeating monsters, which can be used to randomly draw skills and abilities from shops. Lucky players might even get skills or abilities directly dropped by monsters! Combine these with your heroes to unlock powerful synergies.

  • Diverse Monsters & Turn-Based Combat: Each monster has distinct skills, and different rooms feature unique enemy combinations. Strategize accordingly to exploit their weaknesses.

  • Procedurally Generated Dungeons: Every dungeon run features randomly generated rooms, monsters, and paths. Forge your own route and battle varied foes.

Strengthen your heroes with randomized loot, defeat the ultimate boss, and enjoy a brand-new adventure every time!
